allowed_compute: Table generation, graph/schema validation, source/hash checks, repository gates.
processor_and_bound: CPU only; seconds to minutes; no equation solve.
preregistered_certification: Deterministic verifier, exercised mutations, clean manifest replay.
mandatory_stop: Stop after owner-review package is frozen and pushed.
forbidden_upgrade: A plan is not a solution-space result.

allowed_compute: Exact and numerical differential-geometry evaluator regressions.
processor_and_bound: CPU first; bounded unit/regression grids only.
preregistered_certification: All slots/dependencies, reconstruction, identities, independent implementation.
mandatory_stop: Stop on omitted slot, failed identity, or representation mismatch.
forbidden_upgrade: Verified evaluator is not UDT dynamics.

processor_and_bound: CPU symbolic/rational first; bounded sampling only to find witnesses.
preregistered_certification: Discriminant/rank coverage, exact witnesses, mutation catches.
mandatory_stop: Stop if a stratum is found only by floating-point clustering or zero division.
forbidden_upgrade: Local kinematics is not on-shell physics.

allowed_compute: Founded constraint elimination and countermodel census.
preregistered_certification: Every relation cites current theory; surviving dimensions independently counted.
mandatory_stop: Stop on uncited constraint or hidden branch ranking.
forbidden_upgrade: Founded constraints are not an action.

preregistered_certification: Exact immutable dispatch and law/premise manifest.
forbidden_upgrade: Conditional or familiar action cannot become native.

allowed_compute: Full symbolic/automatic variation and operator tests.
preregistered_certification: Two derivations where practical, all field/boundary equations, raw residual identities.
mandatory_stop: Stop on missing field, boundary channel, principal term, or failed reduced-action scar.
forbidden_upgrade: Operator completeness in one lane is not unique native dynamics.

processor_and_bound: CPU exact methods with registered resource caps.
preregistered_certification: No divided-away strata, real witnesses, branch-union accounting.
mandatory_stop: Stop before continuation while branch completeness is unresolved.
forbidden_upgrade: Local EOM structure is not global existence.

allowed_compute: Reduced equations derived from the full equations, followed by small ODE pilots on several preregistered strata.
processor_and_bound: CPU symbolic and bounded CPU integration only; fixed domains, tolerances, branches, timeout, and no retuning.
preregistered_certification: Direct substitution into the full residual, omitted-equation audit, raw residual/backward error, independent integrator where practical, and singular-event ledger.
mandatory_stop: Stop if reduced/full equations disagree, raw residual fails, a branch is lost, or completeness is ambiguous.
forbidden_upgrade: Tool validation or pilot behavior is OBSERVED and never the whole space.

allowed_compute: Cohomogeneity-one ODE branch atlas after the pilot audit.
processor_and_bound: CPU first; at most one GPU process only if separately dispatched; float64; named memory/time/output/checkpoints.
preregistered_certification: Continuation coverage, folds/endpoints, independent CPU anchors, unchanged continuum operator, and all failure branches retained.
mandatory_stop: Stop at the registered resource or coverage contract; never overwrite outputs.
forbidden_upgrade: ODE strata do not cover unrestricted PDE or global space.

allowed_compute: Nonlinear time-live principal, constraint, gauge, and initial/boundary-data analysis before evolution.
processor_and_bound: CPU symbolic/exact first; bounded local numerical checks only.
preregistered_certification: Principal character, constraint propagation identities, admissible data manifold, exact time jets, and failure modes.
mandatory_stop: Stop if physical evolution law, well-posedness, constraint propagation, or time boundary remains undefined.
forbidden_upgrade: A time-dependent configuration is not yet physical evolution.

processor_and_bound: CPU pilot; GPU only by separate written dispatch, one process, explicit device/dtype/grid/memory/checkpoints.
preregistered_certification: Constraint propagation, raw residual, convergence, independent saved-field recomputation, boundary flux.
mandatory_stop: Stop if full physical evolution law/domain is not established or constraints drift beyond preregistered tolerance.
forbidden_upgrade: Time dependence or relaxation is not automatically physical time.

allowed_compute: Global patching, topology, seal, and bootstrap consistency tests.
processor_and_bound: CPU exact/topological first; numerical continuation only under a new bound.
preregistered_certification: Transition cocycles, invariants, boundary completion, no circular parameter definitions.
mandatory_stop: Stop on local-to-global gap or bootstrap circularity.
forbidden_upgrade: A global candidate is not uniquely selected.

allowed_compute: Immutable atlas assembly and completeness audit.
preregistered_certification: Ten-criterion table, raw evidence manifests, independent load-bearing rerun.
mandatory_stop: Stop before any empirical or desired-outcome comparison.
forbidden_upgrade: Frozen atlas is complete only in its explicit regime.

allowed_compute: Downstream GR, empirical, matter, or stability readouts.
processor_and_bound: Separate future dispatches; resources registered per readout.
preregistered_certification: Comparison never modifies upstream candidate set; claims retain upstream premises.
mandatory_stop: Stop if readout feeds back without a newly preregistered exploration.
forbidden_upgrade: Agreement, disagreement, or phenomenology cannot manufacture a native law.
